mapper.select: SELECT sigungu, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month01, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month02, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month03, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month04, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '05' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month05, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '06' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month06, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '07' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month07, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '08' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month08, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '09' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month09, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month10, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '11' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month11, SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(ContYear, 2) = '12' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS month12 FROM KR_REAL_INFO WHERE sido = #{sido} AND ContYear BETWEEN #{startYearMonth} AND #{endYearMonth} GROUP BY sigungu ORDER BY sigungu
